summary: P21 Catalogue Phase Testing Complete. All 17 features tested and verified. Backend APIs (19/19 pytest tests passed) and Frontend UI (all catalogue pages working correctly). Fixed React hooks violation in AddonRecipeCatalogue.jsx. Role-based visibility working correctly - catalogue nav items visible only for master role.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AddonRecipeCatalogue.jsx had React hooks called conditionally - moved all useState/useCallback/useEffect hooks before any conditional returns
api.js correctly implements 27 new catalogue methods with proper response normalization
screenVisibility.js correctly defines scr-catalogue as FULL for master, HIDDEN for central/franchise
Sidebar.jsx correctly renders 4 catalogue nav items (Ingredients, Products, Recipes, Addon Recipes) with proper icons
IngredientCatalogue.jsx correctly shows Ingredients tab (4 items) and Categories tab (2 categories) with CRUD actions
ProductCatalogue.jsx correctly shows Foods tab (3 items), Categories tab, and Addons tab
RecipeCatalogue.jsx correctly shows Recipes tab (2 recipes with ingredient counts) and Sub-Recipes tab (empty state)
AddonRecipeCatalogue.jsx correctly shows addon recipe 'rossa' with price 50.00 and 1 ingredient
Recipe endpoints correctly use /recipe/ prefix (not /product/) as per corrected API contract

test_credentials.master_user: abhishek@kalabahia.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=1, type=master - SEES catalogue nav items)
test_credentials.central_user: owner@democentral2.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=782, type=central - does NOT see catalogue nav items)
test_credentials.franchise_user: owner@demofranchise4.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=786, type=franchise - does NOT see catalogue nav items)

seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P21 Catalogue Phase fully tested. All 4 catalogue pages working: /catalogue/ingredients (4 items, 2 categories), /catalogue/products (3 foods, 1 category, 1 addon), /catalogue/recipes (2 recipes, 0 sub-recipes), /catalogue/addon-recipes (1 addon recipe 'rossa'). Role visibility working correctly - catalogue nav items visible only for master role. Fixed React hooks violation in AddonRecipeCatalogue.jsx. All backend APIs return 200 with expected data.

features_tested.P21-1: PASS - Sidebar shows Ingredients, Products, Recipes, Addon Recipes nav items for master role only
features_tested.P21-2: PASS - /catalogue/ingredients page loads with 4 ingredients (Cooking Oil, maida, patri, red meat) with correct columns
features_tested.P21-3: PASS - /catalogue/ingredients Categories tab shows 2 stock-item-categories (veggies, non veg) with CRUD actions
features_tested.P21-4: PASS - /catalogue/products Foods tab shows 3 foods (aloo parantha ₹101, mutton keema ₹110, polo ₹90)
features_tested.P21-5: PASS - /catalogue/products Categories tab shows food categories list (toast)
features_tested.P21-6: PASS - /catalogue/products Addons tab shows addon list (rossa)
features_tested.P21-7: PASS - /catalogue/recipes Recipes tab shows 2 recipes (aloo parantha with 2 ingredients, mutton keema with 1)
features_tested.P21-8: PASS - /catalogue/recipes Sub-Recipes tab loads with empty state
features_tested.P21-9: PASS - /catalogue/addon-recipes shows addon recipe rossa with 1 ingredient and price 50.00
features_tested.P21-10: PASS - Central user (owner@democentral2.com) does NOT see catalogue nav items in sidebar
features_tested.P21-11: PASS - Franchise user (owner@demofranchise4.com) does NOT see catalogue nav items in sidebar
features_tested.P21-16: PASS - Operations Hub still loads correctly for master user (no regression)
features_tested.P21-17: PASS - Stock Inventory page still works (no regression)

AddonRecipeCatalogue_hooks_violation.issue: React hooks (useState, useCallback, useEffect) were called conditionally after hasAccess check
AddonRecipeCatalogue_hooks_violation.fix: Moved all hooks before any conditional returns, added hasAccess check inside useCallback instead
